decision_policy.identity_truth: The selected Bundle Factory recipe is the sellable-product truth. An Amazon catalog title or count may be accepted only when it describes that exact recipe.
decision_policy.patch_rule: PATCH is safe only when the intended recipe and the ASIN catalog identity are the same product and the conflicting attribute can be aligned without creating a false flavor, size, packaging, or quantity claim.
decision_policy.recreate_rule: Deleting and recreating with the same product identifier is not a remedy when that identifier already resolves to the wrong ASIN. A fallback recreation requires a valid unused GTIN or an approved GTIN-exemption path, preferably with a new seller SKU to prevent stale integrator mappings.
decision_policy.rollback_rule: A rollback may restore an offer or ChannelMAX row only into quarantine. It must never automatically resume selling or repricing against a known false catalog identity.

current_amazon_catalog.title: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwiches, 8oz/4ct - Pack of 6 (24 Sandwiches Total)

components.product: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwich - 8oz/4ct

historical_identity_residue.interpretation: The generated UPC pool collision was already healed on Amazon, but the older ChannelMAX row retained the collided ASIN.

amazon_8541.merchant_value: Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 24 Count
amazon_8541.amazon_value: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwiches, 8oz/4ct - Pack of 6 (24 Sandwiches Total)
amazon_8541.resolution: Aligned the title to the exact catalog wording because both descriptions represent the same six 4-count retail packs / 24 individual sandwiches.

current_hold_normalized.note: The latest ChannelMAX 164 artifact labels this row AMAZON_8541_PRODUCT_IDENTITY_BLOCKER. That label is stale/misclassified: Amazon 8541 is closed; the remaining defect is ChannelMAX retaining the historical collided ASIN.

safe_resolution.channelmax_action: Correct the existing ChannelMAX row from ASIN B0H75VN18Z to B0H776M5B5 through the supported row-edit/import path. If ChannelMAX treats ASIN as immutable, remove and reimport only the ChannelMAX inventory row; do not delete or recreate the Amazon listing.
safe_resolution.release_gate: Keep the SKU excluded from ChannelMAX price automation until a fresh exact readback proves SKU SZ-ASPI-JFAT, item_id or replacement item_id, and ASIN B0H776M5B5 are mapped together.

rollback_prerequisites: Preserve the complete ChannelMAX row snapshot for item_id 171030888, including ASIN, base/floor/ceiling prices, model, inventory, and status.
Preserve a fresh Amazon listing and Catalog Items snapshot for B0H776M5B5 before any ChannelMAX row edit.
Pause or exclude this SKU from ChannelMAX repricing while the mapping is changed and verified.
If a ChannelMAX reimport fails, restore the row snapshot only in quarantine; never resume repricing while it points to B0H75VN18Z.

current_amazon_catalog.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count

components.product: Smuckers Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches, 10 Count, 2 oz Each, Frozen
Smucker's Uncrustables Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread Sandwich - 22.4oz/8ct

resolutions.recipe_catalog_mismatch: Amazon describes all 24 sandwiches as standard 2 oz Raspberry + Mixed Berry and omits Morning Protein. The intended second half is the distinct Morning Protein Mixed Berry 2.8 oz variant. Aligning to Amazon's title would falsely describe the bundle.

amazon_8541.merchant_value: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Sandwich Variety Pack, Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread, 24 Count
amazon_8541.amazon_value: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count

current_hold_normalized.note: ChannelMAX already points to the same ASIN. The hold is caused by the Amazon catalog variant identity, not a ChannelMAX ASIN mismatch.

safe_resolution.first_choice: Open a Selling Partner Support catalog correction/appeal for B0H84WQRXB with exact recipe, packaging, and reference-image evidence. Request a title correction that explicitly identifies 12 Raspberry 2 oz plus 12 Morning Protein Mixed Berry 2.8 oz sandwiches.
safe_resolution.fallback_if_catalog_correction_is_denied: Delete the seller contribution only after the destructive owner gate, then create a correctly identified ASIN using a valid unused GTIN or an approved GTIN exemption, preferably under a new seller SKU. Reusing UPC 756441904864 will rematch B0H84WQRXB and will not solve the defect.
safe_resolution.release_gate: Fresh Catalog Items evidence and a clean validation preview must prove the exact Morning Protein variant, both per-unit sizes, total count 24, and the final ASIN/SKU mapping before offer, media, or price automation is enabled.

rollback_prerequisites: Capture the complete Amazon listing contribution, catalog attributes, issue set, offer, media URLs, UPC/EAN, price/min/max/business price, and inventory before any support or recreation step.
Capture the complete ChannelMAX row for item_id 171137196 and pause/exclude the SKU from repricing and inventory synchronization.
Reserve and validate the unused GTIN or document the approved GTIN-exemption path before deleting the existing contribution.
Prepare a new SKU/ASIN mapping and verify that ChannelMAX and every downstream integrator cannot restore B0H84WQRXB automatically.
If recreation fails, any restored old offer must remain quarantined because the old catalog identity is known to be false for the intended recipe.

current_amazon_catalog.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich, 8 oz, 4 ct - Pack of 45

components.product: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich - 8oz/4ct

resolutions.recipe_catalog_mismatch: The intended sellable bundle contains 45 individual sandwiches. Amazon's title means 45 retail cartons of four and its unit_count is 180. Aligning to 180 would create a material false-quantity claim.

current_hold_normalized.note: The latest ChannelMAX 164 artifact labels this row CHANNELMAX_ASIN_IDENTITY_MISMATCH, but its captured ASIN equals the intended ASIN. The proven blocker is Amazon's 180-versus-45 catalog quantity conflict.

safe_resolution.first_choice: Open a Selling Partner Support catalog correction/appeal for B0H82PKK18. Request unit_count 45 and title/count wording that describes 45 individual sandwiches rather than 45 four-count cartons.
safe_resolution.fallback_if_catalog_correction_is_denied: Delete the seller contribution only after the destructive owner gate, then create a correctly identified ASIN using a valid unused GTIN or an approved GTIN exemption, preferably under a new seller SKU. Reusing UPC 756441902563 will rematch B0H82PKK18 and will not solve the defect.
safe_resolution.release_gate: Fresh Catalog Items evidence plus a clean staged text/count preview must prove title quantity 45, unit_count 45 Count, number_of_items consistent with the sellable bundle, and the final ASIN/SKU mapping before offer, media, or repricing is enabled.

rollback_prerequisites: Capture the complete Amazon listing contribution, catalog attributes, issue set, offer, media URLs, UPC, price/min/max/business price, and inventory before any support or recreation step.
Capture the complete ChannelMAX row for item_id 171130315 and pause/exclude the SKU from repricing and inventory synchronization.
Reserve and validate the unused GTIN or document the approved GTIN-exemption path before deleting the existing contribution.
Prepare a new SKU/ASIN mapping and verify that ChannelMAX and every downstream integrator cannot restore B0H82PKK18 automatically.
If recreation fails, any restored old offer must remain quarantined because unit_count 180 is known to be false for the intended 45-sandwich recipe.

execution_order: Release SZ from the Amazon 8541 hold classification, but keep it held from ChannelMAX price writes until the stale ASIN mapping is corrected and read back.
Prepare evidence-backed Amazon support cases for TY and VN; do not attempt catalog-alignment PATCHes.
Use delete/recreate only as the owner-gated fallback after Amazon rejects the catalog corrections and only after a valid unused identifier path and rollback bundle exist.
